_comment: Order status filtering for net_orders / net_qty / net_sales aggregation. Edit and re-run refresh_daily.py — no code changes needed.
_notes: AWAITING_SHIPMENT excluded (sitting in warehouse, not yet customer-facing).
IN_TRANSIT included on the assumption TikTok uses it for 'with carrier, en route' (not inter-warehouse transfer). Move to excluded if a sample order audit shows otherwise.
REFUNDED rows still count as net; refund value is tracked separately in the refund line item.
Sample orders (order_amount=0): only counted as a sample if the order has also reached a status in net_order_statuses — otherwise it's still pending and shouldn't be in either bucket yet.
